plugin.name: Matter
plugin.description: Sync your Matter reading highlights to NotePlan
plugin.author: ronini

plugin.commands.name: Matter: Login
plugin.commands.description: Authenticate with your Matter account via QR code

plugin.commands.name: Matter: Complete Login
plugin.commands.description: Complete login after scanning the QR code in Matter app

plugin.commands.name: Matter: Rebuild
plugin.commands.description: Full sync of all highlights from Matter (ignores last sync time)

plugin.settings.title: Access Token (managed automatically via Login command)
plugin.settings.description: Do not edit manually. Use the 'Matter: Login' command to authenticate.

plugin.settings.title: Base Folder
plugin.settings.description: Root folder where Matter notes will be created

plugin.settings.title: Tag Prefix
plugin.settings.description: Prefix to add to imported tags (e.g., 'Matter' becomes 'Matter/tagname')

plugin.settings.title: Group by Content Type
plugin.settings.description: Organize notes into subfolders (articles, podcasts, etc.)

plugin.settings.title: Recreate Missing Notes
plugin.settings.description: If a previously synced note is missing, recreate it on next sync

plugin.settings.title: Metadata Format
plugin.settings.description: How to store article metadata in the note

plugin.settings.title: Highlight Style
plugin.settings.description: How to format highlights in the note

plugin.settings.title: Include Highlight Notes
plugin.settings.description: Show user notes attached to highlights

plugin.settings.title: Include Article Note
plugin.settings.description: Show your personal note for the article

plugin.settings.title: Log Level
plugin.settings.description: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, or none
